## How to Convert Quintals to Metric Tons

1 quintal = 100 kilograms

faq.q: How many kilograms are in a quintal?
faq.a: One quintal equals 100 kilograms, which is the standard agricultural unit in Spanish-speaking countries and Mediterranean regions.

faq.q: How do I convert quintals to metric tons?
faq.a: Select your conversion direction, enter the value, and the calculator applies the standard formula. 1 quintal = 100 kg.

faq.q: What is a quintal used for?
faq.a: A quintal (qq) is a unit of mass commonly used in agriculture, grain trading, and commerce, especially in Latin America and Mediterranean countries.

faq.q: What's the difference between a quintal and a metric ton?
faq.a: 1 quintal = 100 kg, while 1 metric ton = 1,000 kg. A metric ton equals 10 quintals.
